note: Array order must not change — Versus seed system uses indices

schema.name: Full display name with country/region context e.g. 'Ajanta Caves, India'
schema.continent: One of: Europe, Africa, Middle_East, North_America, Oceania, Asia, South_America
schema.type: One of: city, capital, ancient_monument, island, monument, religious_site, state_capital, national_park, natural_wonder, region
schema.disabled: Optional boolean — entry exists but is excluded from game rotation
